summary: chore(settings): replace esbuild with tsc/ts-node in packages/fxa-settings
description:
Because:
- We want to test & develop with what we deploy.

This commit:
- Part of the esbuild -> tsc/ts-node migration (split of a6d1a55ae4, PR mozilla/fxa#20390).
- Scope: files under packages/fxa-settings (including deletion of deriver.ts).
